name: Crosswhite Athletic Club SML
description: Crosswhite Athletic Club SML is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Hardy, VA. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like locker rooms, restrooms, and water. You can’t reserve the courts. A membership is required to play.

name: Essig Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at Essig Recreation Center in Rocky Mount, VA! There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights.

name: Smith Mountain Lake YMCA of Franklin County
description:
The SML YMCA is a Selkirk sponsored facility with Selkirk loaner paddles of all levels. We offer a combination of times for all skill levels to play, beginner lessons, and advanced drills/lessons. For exact times, join our TeamReach using the code YSML9622
Our 5 outdoor courts with asphalt and rubber combination cushion are in the process of being built, and will be open by early Fall!
fees: Members only — Potential Members can purchase a day pass for $12

name: The Water's Edge Country Club
description: The Water's Edge Country Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Penhook, VA. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private.

name: Waterfront Golf & Country Club
description: Come play pickleball at Waterfront Golf & Country Club in Moneta, VA! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. A membership is required to play.
